response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates exceptional depth and breadth in fullstack development, with extensive experience in TypeScript, React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL (or similar relational databases). His background includes building scalable platforms, integrating multiple data sources, and working with modern architectures (Kubernetes, AWS, microservices). While his current roles skew senior, his track record of quick adaptation and pragmatic problem-solving aligns well with a junior/mid-level role in renewable energy/construction tech. The only minor concerns are his overqualification and potential misalignment with the required on-site presence.
strengths: TypeScript/Node.js expertise with fullstack solutions across multiple industries
Deep experience with scalable architectures (Kubernetes, AWS, microservices) and integrations
Strong learning ability and collaboration skills demonstrated by mentoring, workshops, and open-source contributions
concerns: Overqualified for an entry-level role (extensive senior/staff-level experience)
Limited direct experience with PostgreSQL (primarily MongoDB and MySQL)
Potential misalignment with high on-site presence requirement due to current remote-focused roles
